SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL20C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL20C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 2.0 forward compatible functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_draw_buffers
  • GL_ARB_fragment_program
  • GL_ARB_shader_objects
  • GL_ARB_vertex_program
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
